query: light leak halation orange red film overexposed analog
message: anti-aesthetic / clarity_and_focus / film_artifacts: light leaks, halation, overexposed film

response.objective_caption: An abstract image dominated by swirling red and orange tones, with a soft vertical band of lighter yellow-orange near the center. The forms suggest flowing fabric or organic tissue in motion, with no distinguishable subjects or objects.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: An abstract image dominated by swirling red and orange tones, with a soft vertical band of lighter yellow-orange near the center. The entire frame is intentionally blurred through motion or soft focus, dissolving any potential subjects into flowing smears of color. The aggressive red palette clashes against deeper crimson and orange shadows, while an overall sickly warm cast permeates the image. The absence of discernible forms and the suffocating color atmosphere evoke unease and distress.
